description: Performance budgets enforced by scripts/perf/check-budgets.ts. Numbers are guard-rails — when a budget needs to move, raise the threshold here AND document it in CHANGELOG.md / release notes.

budgets.label: Cold-boot time of the server (ms)
budgets.rationale: Operators expect `survhub start` to be ready within 5s; longer boots feel unresponsive on a Mac mini.

budgets.label: Warm-boot time of the server (ms)
budgets.rationale: After migrations have run, a restart should be effectively instant.

budgets.label: Deploy of a hello-world Node service (ms)
budgets.rationale: Anything over a minute on a known-fast fixture means the build pipeline regressed.

budgets.label: Web dashboard bundle size (bytes, gzipped)
budgets.rationale: Keep the dashboard sub-1MB so it loads quickly over slow tunnels.

budgets.label: p95 latency of GET /health (ms)
budgets.rationale: The /health endpoint is unauthenticated and synchronous; a regression here hides under more interesting routes.
